violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food inside microwave.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — ---Observed ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors and walls need to be cleaned.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Observed light shield in food prep area was hanging open.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
